zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Touchet於1398年出生在英國薩默塞特瑟 斯度維時，她的父親Sir John Touchet Lord Audley27歲，母親Elizabeth de Stafford23歲。她於1422年與Sir John Luttrell在英國薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1438年6月1日在英國薩默塞特登斯特享年40歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Touchet于1398年出生在英国薩默塞特瑟 斯度維时，她的父亲Sir John Touchet Lord Audley27岁，母亲Elizabeth de Stafford23岁。她于1422年与Sir John Luttrell在英国薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1438年6月1日在英国薩默塞特登斯特享年40岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特登斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Touchet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Anastasie, Denys, Evest, Minos, Rodolph, Vernice.
French: topographic name for someone who lived by a small grove, from a diminutive of Old French toche ‘grove’.
History: René Touchet from Thorigné-d'Anjou in Maine-et-Loire, France, married Marie Caillé in Saint-Laurent, Île-de-Montreal, QC, in 1746.

variants.name: Touchette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Armand, Collette, Euclide, Henri, Hilaire, Huguette.
Altered form of French Touchet , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Touchet was born in 1398, in Nether Stowey, Somerset, England, her father, Sir John Touchet Lord Audley, was 27 and her mother, Elizabeth de Stafford, was 23. She married Sir John Luttrell in 1422, in Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 1 June 1438, in Dunster, Somerset, England, at the age of 40, and was buried in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Touchet est née en 1398, à Nether Stowey, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Touchet Lord Audley, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Stafford, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Luttrell en 1422, à Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 juin 1438, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Touchet 1398 in Nether Stowey, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Touchet Lord Audley 27 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Stafford 23. Sie hat 1422 in Somerset, England Sir John Luttrell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Juni 1438 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Dunster, Somerset, England und wurde in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Touchet è nata il nel 1398 nel Nether Stowey, Somerset, England, sua padre, Sir John Touchet Lord Audley, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Stafford, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Luttrell nel 1422, nel Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 1 giugno 1438, nel Dunster, Somerset, England, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Dunster, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Touchetが1398年にイギリスソメルセトネスエル ストウエイで生まれた時，父Sir John Touchet Lord Audleyは27歳，母Elizabeth de Staffordは23歳であった。1422年にイギリスソメルセトでSir John Luttrellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1438年6月1日にイギリスソメルセトダンスターで40歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトダンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Touchet(이)가 1398년 영국 서머세트 네터 스타베이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Touchet Lord Audley(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Stafford(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1422년 영국 서머세트에서 Sir John Luttrell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1438년 6월 1일 영국 서머세트 던스터에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 던스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Touchet nasceu em 1398, em Nether Stowey, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Touchet Lord Audley, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Stafford, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Luttrell em 1422, em Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de junho de 1438, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Touchet родилась в 1398 г. в местности нетир стоуи, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Touchet Lord Audley было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Stafford, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Luttrell в 1422 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 1 июня 1438 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Touchet nació en 1398, en Nether Stowey, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Touchet Lord Audley, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Stafford, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir John Luttrell en 1422, en Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 1 de junio de 1438, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultada en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
